block_01: If you prefer opening and closing a deal on the same day, you might call yourself an intraday trader. This type of trading is quite popular and has many advantages — at the same time, it also has its risks.
block_02: How can you set yourself up for intraday trading success? Start by exploring 3 of the most common strategies traders use to benefit from short-term trades.
block_04: Bollinger Bands Width — Unique Volatility Indicator
block_05: Knowing how to use Bollinger Bands is simply a must for all traders. Learn how to apply this volatility indicator and make it part of your strategy.
block_07: 8 Risk Management Tips from the World’s Top Traders
block_08: Ever wonder how the world’s top traders deal with risk? These 8 quotes offer valuable insight into the risks associated with trading and how to tackle them.
